import React from 'react'; import { WEDDING } from '../weddingData'; import './Couple.css'; export default function Couple() { return (
Hello!

The Happy Couple

August 11th, 2030 — {WEDDING.venue}

We invite you to celebrate our wedding

{/* Groom Card */}

{WEDDING.groomFullName}

{WEDDING.groomBio}

♥
{/* Bride Card */}

{WEDDING.brideFullName}

{WEDDING.brideBio}

); }
